name: adobe-plugin-dev
description: Build Adobe Creative Cloud plugins with UXP (Unified Extensibility Platform) from scratch to production. Covers InDesign (and extensible to Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects).

skills.name: adobe-plugin-dev
skills.description: Use when the user wants to create, scaffold, build, debug, or publish a UXP plugin for any Adobe Creative Cloud app (InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects). Triggers on mentions of UXP, CEP migration, Adobe extensions, scripts, or panels.
